name: Can I get workers comp if my work environment made my asthma or pre-existing condition worse?
description: Yes, you are eligible if work conditions aggravated or accelerated your condition. You must provide medical evidence showing a distinct worsening of your health

mainEntity.name: Can I get workers comp if my work environment made my asthma or pre-existing condition worse?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, you are eligible if work conditions aggravated or accelerated your condition. You must provide medical evidence showing a distinct worsening of your health specifically due to workplace exposure.
